name: @getcodextheme/website
description: Public website application for the free Get Codex Theme community Registry.

scripts.dev: npm run prepare:assets && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:assets && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext build
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc && npm run verify:deployment
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply getcodextheme-production --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:seo && npm run test:site
scripts.test:unit: npm run prepare:assets && node --test tests/concept-themes.test.mjs tests/css-regression-*.test.mjs tests/google-theme-pack.test.mjs tests/open-source-sync.test.mjs tests/theme-submission.test.mjs tests/theme-community.test.mjs
